case_title: CATIVO, ANGELA MERCEDES VS ALFARO, ALEXANDER JOSE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CATIVO, ANGELA MERCEDES AS TO DEFENDANT ALFARO, ALEXANDER JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-26-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-07-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 PER STIPULATION.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-07-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-04-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 NO HEARING WILL BE REQUIRED IF 1ST OF 2 PAYMENTS MADE PRIOR TO HEARING DATE. ON 01/04/02 COURT WILL CONTINUE FOR ADDITIONAL 30 DAYS FOR FINAL PAYMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALFARO, ALEXANDER JOSE NON APPEARANCE OF PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALFARO, ALEXANDER JOSE

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-04-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-08-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS W/ THE FINAL PAYMENT, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 2/8/02 @ 10 AM. AND THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE ACTION W/ PREJUDICE.
